label: Structured-output parsing, validation & repair

node.label: Structured-output parsing, validation & repair
node.definition: Structured-output pipelines parse generated artifacts, validate schema and semantic constraints, and retry, repair, or escalate outputs that fail.
node.why_it_matters: They convert probabilistic text generation into a bounded interface suitable for downstream software.
limitations: Repair loops can mask systematic model errors and still require explicit semantic, authorization, and side-effect checks.

sentence_units.text: Structured-output pipelines parse generated artifacts, validate schema and semantic constraints, and retry, repair, or escalate outputs that fail.
They convert probabilistic text generation into a bounded interface suitable for downstream software.
